body_txt: Ever since the invention of money, there have been people who have it, and people who don't. And one of the benefits of being rich is being able to hire people to do various things for you, like gardeners, maids, pool boys, chefs, etc. And in many instances, the people who are being hired are fairly attractive, and the wealthy are fairly used to getting what they want, when they want it. And so what if they're married ? A Happily Arranged Marriage isn't always in the cards for someone wealthy, and if the young maid or butler just happens to catch their eye, or a gardener, or the handsome young pool boy with their rippling muscles, well... Certain types of "help" will overlap with Inherently Attractive Profession , such as pool boys and maids . Orientation isn't always an issue either. A poolboy might find out that Even the Guys Want Him or a lovely maid might discover that her mistress really enjoys being bathed . And sometimes, they might even find themselves on the receiving end of the attentions of both the Lord and Lady of the House. Orientation may also play a part in these sorts of relationships even taking place, if a political marriage is done between spouses of Incompatible Orientation . A husband with no interest in his wife might drive her into the arms of the handsome gardener, for instance. Some works may depict the servant as being perfectly fine with the arrangement. Some may even try to instigate such a relationship, sometimes because they genuinely admire their employer/master, other times because they're hoping to manipulate events to acquire a wealthy and powerful spouse for themselves. If the servants/help weren't entirely consenting, the notorious arrogance of the wealthy elite might see them engage in Blaming the Victim . It is not, however, outside the realm of possibility in fiction to find such a relationship portrayed sincere and genuine, although in those cases, the servant had best beware of jealous spouses , disapproving parents, or assassins in political intrigues. Such liaisons are also a common source of (and Freudian Excuse for) the Bastard Bastard . It may well overlap with Questionable Consent or even Rape Is a Special Kind of Evil . Will often result in a Power Dynamics Kink . This can result in Secret Other Family and Remarried to the Mistress . Compare Cheating with the Milkman . This is a subtrope of Unequal Pairing , as the difference in power between a servant and a master is substantial. Also a Sub-Trope of Sleeping with the Boss , with an emphasis on what would essentially be live-in servants for the wealthy and aristocratic, as well as royalty/nobility, as well as A Sub-Trope of How They Treat the Help . Super-Trope to Marry the Nanny , which describes how child carers often end up with parents due to their proximity to the kids of the household. May overlap with Bodyguard Crush if the guard is a regular member of the household. See also Double Standard: Rape, Divine on Mortal , when supernatural beings abuse the power imbalance. Compare Sexual Predator Boss . Compare and contrast Pizza Boy Special Delivery . While there are more than enough historical examples to show that this is Truth in Television , because this is a sex trope, No Real Life Examples, Please! .
